blended.narrative: Mt. Seymour is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 14 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 996 ft. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
